BAY OF BISCAY.
FRANCE.
DNC 08.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 051430Z TO 051630Z OCT
   IN AREAS:
   A. BOUND BY
      46-40.00N 003-48.45W, 46-40.00N 004-43.70W,
      47-15.46N 004-22.61W, 47-25.00N 004-09.91W,
      47-25.00N 003-58.55W.
   B. WITHIN 30 MILES OF 47-18.93N 003-46.53W
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 051730Z OCT 22.
